title: Samurai-in-Rain
global_style: cinematic 35mm anamorphic, muted color grading, dramatic shadows

scenes.storyboard_prompt: A lone samurai stands at the edge of a misty mountain cliff at dawn, back to camera, overlooking a vast valley below, traditional armor, katana sheathed, fog rising from below
scenes.video_prompt: A lone samurai stands at cliff edge, camera slowly pushes forward, wind moves his cloak gently, mist swirls around his feet
scenes.motion: gentle wind motion, swirling mist, slow and contemplative
scenes.style: golden hour rim lighting, moody atmosphere

scenes.storyboard_prompt: The samurai unsheathes his katana in close-up, water droplets running down the polished blade, reflection of stormy sky in the metal
scenes.video_prompt: Extreme close-up of katana being drawn slowly from sheath, water droplets roll down the blade in slow motion, sky reflects in the steel
scenes.camera: extreme close-up, macro lens, rack focus
scenes.motion: slow draw of blade, water droplets falling in slow motion
scenes.style: high contrast, silver tones, cinematic slow motion

scenes.storyboard_prompt: Wide shot of a bamboo forest in heavy rain, the samurai walks down a dirt path between tall bamboo stalks, lightning illuminates the scene from behind
scenes.video_prompt: Samurai walks steadily through bamboo forest in heavy rain, wide tracking shot following from side, lightning flash illuminates scene, rain drops visible in air
scenes.camera: wide tracking shot from side, 35mm anamorphic
scenes.motion: steady forward walk, rain falling, lightning flash, bamboo swaying
scenes.style: dramatic lightning, dark and stormy, rain streaks visible

scenes.storyboard_prompt: The samurai faces 5 shadowy opponents in a burning village at night, embers floating in the air, fire in background, dramatic standoff
scenes.video_prompt: Samurai faces multiple opponents in burning village, camera circles slowly around the standoff, embers float through air like orange snow, fire crackles in background
scenes.motion: slow rotation of camera, embers drifting, tension building
scenes.style: fire and shadow contrast, orange and black palette, dramatic

scenes.storyboard_prompt: The samurai sheathes his katana and walks away from smoldering ruins into the morning mist, silhouette against orange sky
scenes.video_prompt: Samurai sheathes sword and walks away from camera into morning mist, silhouette shrinks against glowing orange horizon, peaceful resolution
scenes.camera: wide static shot, low angle looking up
scenes.motion: slow walk into mist, figure gradually disappearing, serene
scenes.style: sunrise orange, silhouette, peaceful resolution, lens flare
